hooks.command: printf '%s\n' 'For the first substantial work turn in a thread, apply $groundcraft and use $groundcraft-handoff once to check relevant unfinished work. Ground factual claims, including drafts, in evidence. For tiny known-path changes with direct proof, act directly without announcing either skill or describing a sequence of steps; any required progress update names only the immediate action. Also skip both skills for casual chat, simple translation or formatting, trivial stable facts, or free ideation. Do not ask the user to choose a workflow.'
hooks.commandWindows: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Write-Output 'For the first substantial work turn in a thread, apply $groundcraft and use $groundcraft-handoff once to check relevant unfinished work. Ground factual claims, including drafts, in evidence. For tiny known-path changes with direct proof, act directly without announcing either skill or describing a sequence of steps; any required progress update names only the immediate action. Also skip both skills for casual chat, simple translation or formatting, trivial stable facts, or free ideation. Do not ask the user to choose a workflow.'"

hooks.command: printf '%s\n' 'Apply $groundcraft to substantial delegated work. Stay within scope, keep domain skills in charge of their procedures, and return evidence rather than confidence.'
hooks.commandWindows: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Write-Output 'Apply $groundcraft to substantial delegated work. Stay within scope, keep domain skills in charge of their procedures, and return evidence rather than confidence.'"
